description_long: This is a tall, slender stone obelisk with a rectangular cross-section, standing upright on a square base. The front face is adorned with intricate carvings, including geometric patterns and possibly symbolic motifs, while the rear face features a simple engraved cross. The stone surface appears weathered and rough, suggesting age and historical significance. The obelisk is mounted on a stepped plinth, which is itself set on a larger, flat platform, likely for stability and prominence. The tip of the obelisk is slightly irregular and unfinished, with a rough, natural break rather than a pointed or polished finish. The overall coloration is a pale, pinkish-beige, typical of certain types of limestone or sandstone.
description: A tall, rectangular stone obelisk with ornate carvings on the front and a cross on the back, set on a stepped square base. The surface is rough and weathered, with a pale pinkish-beige color.
description_view_0: Front view shows detailed geometric and symbolic carvings on the main face, with the stepped base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the obelisk's slender profile and the thickness of the stone, with minimal decoration visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a simple engraved cross on a rough, unadorned surface, and the full extent of the base platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the thinness of the obelisk and the texture of the stone, with no major decorations.
attribute_inscription: No visible text inscriptions; only decorative carvings and a cross motif are present.
attribute_ornamentation: Front face features intricate geometric and symbolic carvings in low relief; rear face has a simple engraved cross. No other ornamentation visible on sides or tip.
attribute_base_design: The base is a stepped, square plinth made of the same stone as the obelisk, with a slightly raised platform for stability. The edges are straight and unadorned, with a flat surface.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is irregular and appears roughly broken or unfinished, lacking any pointed or decorative feature.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a flat, square platform, possibly simulating paving or a foundation. No other surrounding features are visible.
